home-cleaning.name: Home Cleaning
home-cleaning.description: Professional residential cleaning service that covers dusting, vacuuming, mopping, and sanitizing all living spaces to maintain a pristine home environment.

move-out-cleaning.name: Move Out Cleaning
move-out-cleaning.description: Deep cleaning service specifically designed for those moving in or out of a property, ensuring the space is spotless for the next occupants.

office-cleaning.name: Office Cleaning
office-cleaning.description: Commercial cleaning solutions for offices and workplaces to create a healthy, productive environment for employees and clients alike.

deep-cleaning.name: Deep Cleaning
deep-cleaning.description: An intensive cleaning process that reaches hidden dirt and grime in hard-to-reach areas, including kitchens, bathrooms, and detailed surfaces.

general-plumbing.name: General Plumbing
general-plumbing.description: Expert plumbing repairs and maintenance for pipes, leaks, and drainage systems to ensure your home's water system runs smoothly.

faucets.name: Faucets
faucets.description: Installation and repair of kitchen and bathroom faucets, including leak fixes and modern fixture upgrades.

toilets.name: Toilets
toilets.description: Comprehensive toilet repair and installation services, addressing clogs, leaks, and flushing mechanism issues.

tv-mounting.name: TV Mounting
tv-mounting.description: Secure wall mounting for TVs of all sizes, including wire concealment and bracket installation for the perfect viewing angle.

light-fixtures.name: Light Fixtures
light-fixtures.description: Professional installation of chandeliers, pendant lights, and wall sconces to brighten and enhance your home's interior.

ceiling-fans.name: Ceiling Fans
ceiling-fans.description: Safe installation and wiring of ceiling fans to improve air circulation and comfort in any room.

general-electric.name: General Electric
general-electric.description: Standard electrical repairs, troubleshooting, and circuit maintenance performed by certified professionals.

packing.name: Packing and Unpacking
packing.description: Stress-free moving assistance including careful packing of items and organized unpacking at your new destination.

lawn-care.name: Lawn Care
lawn-care.description: Outdoor maintenance including grass cutting, edging, and debris removal to keep your yard looking its best.

gutters.name: Gutters and Downspouts
gutters.description: Cleaning and minor repairs for gutters and downspouts to ensure proper water drainage and prevent home damage.
